<!--
A real problem: a specific person or group whose situation would
actually improve if it were solved. No problem is too small — small
and real beats big and vague.
-->

## Description

<!-- What's wrong, for whom, and what would "better" look like? -->

## Source

<!-- Where does this problem come from? Your own experience, someone
you know (with their explicit consent — required), something you
observed? -->

- [ ] This is my own problem, OR I have the problem-owner's explicit
      consent to post it.

## Potential impact

<!-- Honestly: who benefits if this gets solved, and how much? -->

## What's been tried (if anything)

<!-- Optional. Existing solutions you know of, and why they don't
work here. -->
